title: DAOT: Mobility+
description: An addon for the mod Danny's AOT that adds vertical orbit with original physics, aerial quad-directional boosts and third person visual improvements!
body:
#  DAOT: Mobility+ _enhances_ the mod Danny's AOT's ODM gear with new custom physics, cinematic visuals and more!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/M7o-FKW62-4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## FEATURES:
* new vertical swing physics for smoother, more controllable movement
* vertical control (W/S) is fully independent from orbit (A/D) 
* you now have AERIAL BOOSTS!! double tapping W or space will launch you forward, S S launches you backward and A A or D D launches you sideways!
* boosts also come with a little boost bar on your HUD under the crosshiar
* boosts even have a little shockwave ring the you produce behind you! (see gallery)
* in third person the faster you go your FOV launches back for an awsome sense of speed and the camera raises slightly for better visability
* you also get slight motion blur at the edges of your screen aswell
* ALSO you get anime "speed lines" that brighten the faster you go and spin clockwise around the edges of your screen
* now when orbiting if you turn your camera towards the hook you turn harder!
* if you want to you can now lock the rope in its current length to become a human swing set by holding sprint key (WIP)

##   MULTIPLAYER UPDATE!!!
Mobility+ has been rebuilt to support:
* minecraft servers with a new hybrid system
* LAN
* singleplayer
* mod menu
* boosts using DAOT's gas!

### the addon now uses the same jar to work in client and server!
## IMPORTANT: HYBRID system uses both client and server sides to work in multiplayer
### that means that the client and server needs Mobility+ in their "mods" folder 

CLIENT SIDE

* uses original physics
* camera steering
* lock-rope
* cinematic 3rd person

SERVER SIDE

* boost authority
* gas usage
* cooldown validation
* config override
* server boost authority

server:

* recieves boost packets
* validates cooldowns
* checks gas usage
* applies final boost!

this prevents:

* infinite boosting
* cooldown bypassing
* gas bypass exploits

### REAL DAOT gas integration!
Mobility+ now directly works with DAOT's gas system

* reads actual ODM gear gas data
* consumes gas during boosts
* blocks boosts when empty
* FULL CONFIG!!

added:

* cloth config api support
* optional mod menu integration
* JSON config file support
* server-side gameplay configuration

config settings:

* boosts use gas (true/false)
* boost gas cost (number)
* boost cooldown ticks (number)
* boost strength (number)
* cinematic third person (true/false)
* vertical strength multiplier (number)
* speed cap (number)
### PASSIVE MOVEMENT STYLES
BLITZ MODE:

* only works when not using any input other than hook key
* 75% increased speed cap
* increased acceleration

CONTROL MODE:

* active when using input other than hook key like w/a/s/d/sprint
* vertical and horizontal orbit
* rope lock mode 
![when using mod menu this is what the Mobility+ config will look like](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a38c8900fab858be7796fc3620451b18d547b0f6.png)

versions 1.0.1 and 1.0.2 work in DAOT version 1.0.19 but version 1.0.3 works in DAOT version 1.0.39 and 1.1.0 works on servers and with DAOT version 2.0.0!!

dependencies:
* Fabric API
* DAOT version 1.0.19 or version 1.0.39
* cloth config API
* mod menu (optional but recomended)

credits to:
* Danny for creating an amazing mod and giving me permission to publish Mobility+ !
* my friend Axon for assistance with physics and movement tuning
* AsunaMayu for "boosts use gas" idea
